tasks.title: Upgrade your Advanced SQL & Database Design proof
tasks.description: You already have some Advanced SQL & Database Design background. Build something slightly stronger than your resume proof, write what changed, and keep the proof small enough for this week.
tasks.why_now: Use EXPLAIN ANALYZE to identify sequential scans and implement covering indexes to speed up data retrieval for training loops.

tasks.title: Start Statistics for Machine Learning with one small proof
tasks.description: Learn the minimum needed for Statistics for Machine Learning, then create one small proof instead of only watching content.
tasks.why_now: Implement A/B testing frameworks for your Agentic RAG pipelines to statistically prove which retrieval strategy is superior.
